Imports

pbt_types

Procs

proc arbTuple[A](a1: Arbitrary[A]): Arbitrary[(A,)]
Arbitrary of single-value tuple 
proc arbTuple[A, B](a1: Arbitrary[A]; a2: Arbitrary[B]): Arbitrary[(A, B)]
Arbitrary of pair tuple 
proc arbInt(): Arbitrary[int] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc arbInt(min, max: int): Arbitrary[int] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
create a int arbitrary with values in the range of min and max which are inclusive. 
proc arbuint32(): Arbitrary[uint32] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc arbuint32(min, max: uint32): Arbitrary[uint32] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
create a uint32 arbitrary with values in the range of min and max which are inclusive. 
proc arbChar(min, max: char): Arbitrary[char] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
create a char arbitrary for a given range 
proc arbChar(): Arbitrary[char] {...}{.inline, raises: [], tags: [].}
create a char arbitrary for the full character range, see: arbcharAscii 
proc arbCharAscii(): Arbitrary[char] {...}{.inline, raises: [], tags: [].}
create an ascii char arbitrary 
proc arbSeqOf[T](a: Arbitrary[T]; min: uint32 = 0; max: uint32 = 100): Arbitrary[
    seq[T]]
create a sequence of varying size of some type 
proc arbString(min: uint32 = 0; max: uint32 = 1000; arbchar = arbchar()): Arbitrary[
    string] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
create strings using the full character range with len of min to max see: arbstringAscii 
proc arbstringAscii(min: uint32 = 0; max: uint32 = 1000): Arbitrary[string] {...}{.
    inline, raises: [], tags: [].}
create strings using the ascii character range with len of min to max 
proc arbEnum[T: enum](values: set[T] = {low(T) .. high(T)}): Arbitrary[T]
proc arbNimNode(): Arbitrary[NimNode] {...}{.raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect].}
